title: Cognition’s Scott Wu says AI coding agents shouldn’t replace humans
desc: Cognition makes Devin, the first and arguably most successful AI coding agent. But famed coder Wu says it isn't designed to supplant human programmers.

title: Asana acquires no-code agent-builder StackAI
desc: Asana will incorporate StackAI into its growing suite of AI workflow tools.

title: Just like gold and oil, we’ll soon be able to trade AI token futures
desc: Large exchanges are designing derivative products around AI tokens, which are increasingly being considered less a computational output and more a raw material input, like electricity or bandwidth.

title: How long is Anthropic’s lease with SpaceX? Opinions vary
desc: Elon Musk is publicly reframing xAI’s massive Anthropic compute deal as short-term and cancellable, despite SpaceX’s own S-1 filing describing payments through May 2029.

title: Startup offers free home cleaning—if it can record it all for robot training
desc: The latest twist in paying humans to wear head cameras for robot training data.

title: LLMs believe false statements even after explicit warnings that they're false
desc: Fine-tuning tests show "bias... toward confidently representing the claims as true."

title: Fed up with vibe coders, dev sneaks data-nuking prompt injection into their code
desc: Undisclosed addition in jqwik instructed AI coding agents to delete app output.

title: Hands-On With Gemini Spark: I Gave It Access to My Life and It Friend-Zoned My Boyfriend
desc: Google’s new AI agent combed through my emails, documents, and calendar to plan a birthday party and still didn’t clock the person most important to me.

title: We Asked the ‘Future of Truth’ Author to Explain How He Used AI. It Didn’t Go Well
desc: A book about how AI shapes perceptions of reality came under fire for using AI-generated quotes. Its problems go beyond that.

title: The Vatican’s Man Inside Anthropic
desc: Pope Leo XIV may not be able to disarm AI, but he’s got the attention of the industry.

title: New Moms Are Returning to Coding Jobs Radically Reshaped by AI
desc: New mothers working in software development are staring down an AI-pilled workplace they barely recognize.

title: Vertu Is Back With a Folding Phone Powered by—Surprise—an AI Agent
desc: The beleaguered luxury phone maker is pushing the AlphaFold, which has decent specs and comes with Vertu’s new Hermes Agent on board, to wealthy would-be buyers.
